use_cases: Freehand drawing on a dark canvas with gradient strokes
Creating interactive sketch interfaces for creative tools
Building annotation tools for educational platforms
Adding signature or quick doodle capture to applications
Prototyping drawing features in design or dev tools
ai_summary: An interactive freehand drawing canvas component that captures mouse/touch drag movements and renders them as smooth curved lines with an orange-to-yellow gradient stroke on a dark background. The component maintains multiple line histories and uses the Visx drag hook for precise input tracking.
